Name: Octopus - Check Blue Green Deployment
Description:
This step checks to ensure that deployments to blue/green environments alternate. The output variable `SequentialDeploy` is set to `True` if two deployments are done to the same environment, and `False` if they are alternating.

A common scenario is to check for `SequentialDeploy` set to `True` and display a warning or the manual intervention step to confirm a deployment.

Parameters.Name: BlueGreen.Octopus.Api.Key
Parameters.Label: The Octopus API key
Parameters.HelpText: Use the documentation at https://octopus.com/docs/octopus-rest-api/how-to-create-an-api-key to create an API key.

Parameters.Name: BlueGreen.Environment.Blue.Name
Parameters.Label: The name of the blue environment
Parameters.HelpText: This is the name of the environment in Octopus that represents the blue deployment stack. It will be something like `Production - Blue`.

Parameters.Name: BlueGreen.Environment.Green.Name
Parameters.Label: The name of the green environment
Parameters.HelpText: This is the name of the environment in Octopus that represents the green deployment stack. It will be something like `Production - Green`.
